description_long: This is a reusable travel cup with a black plastic lid and a wide, matte black silicone grip band around its midsection. The main body of the cup is decorated with an intricate black-and-white pattern featuring stylized skulls and ornate flourishes, giving it a gothic or alternative aesthetic. The lid appears to be a snap-on type with a small drinking spout and a central vent hole. The cup's body tapers towards the base, making it easy to hold and fit into standard cup holders. The silicone grip provides insulation and a non-slip surface for handling hot beverages. There is a circular embossed area on the grip band, possibly for branding or added texture.
description: A gothic-style reusable travel cup with a black lid, wide silicone grip, and ornate skull pattern on the body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the skull pattern, black lid, and a circular embossed area on the silicone grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the drinking spout on the lid and the continuous decorative skull motif.
description_view_2: Rear view with the skull pattern centered and the silicone grip band fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uninterrupted skull design and the matte black grip.
